_comment: Tool manifest read by setup-tools.sh on container boot.
Add tools your AI agent should have access to; they install into
Each tool has a version and an 'update' block; set method to 'manual'
to pin, or use 'github'/'url' to track upstream.
kiro-cli is downloaded separately by entrypoint.sh (licensing).
dtach, git, jq, less, curl, ca-certificates, openssh-client, unzip
are baked into the image (core runtime deps).
